chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

text: 4318 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ بَرِئَ مِنَ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ صَادِقاً كَانَ أَوْ كَاذِباً فَقَدْ بَرِئَ اَللَّهُ مِنْهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4318 - Imam (as) also said: "Whoever disassociates from Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, whether truthfully or falsely, then Allah (swt) has disassociated from him."
